page: OVHcloud r3-64 is a memory-optimized virtual server powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC Milan processor running at 2.3 GHz. The system is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is supported by a 200 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is established with a 2 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark results indicate strong memory performance, with the Passmark memory score placing in the top tier (top 10%). Large block uncached memory write bandwidth is also strong, reaching 101.05 GB/sec. Single-core CPU performance is strong, as evidenced by Geekbench single-core and stress-ng single-core tests, while multi-core performance and database operations fall within the average range. The server demonstrates strong text processing and single-threaded bzip3 decompression capabilities, alongside average performance in Redis SET operations and static web serving.

Given its high memory density relative to the 8 dedicated vCPUs, the r3-64 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel compute scaling. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable performance without resource contention. This configuration is highly suitable for memory-intensive applications, including caching layers, in-memory databases, medium-scale database operations, and text processing pipelines.
description: The OVHcloud r3-64 is a memory-optimized virtual server utilizing the KVM hypervisor and an x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores running at 2.3 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB per core ratio. Storage is provided by a local 200 GB NVMe SSD, and network throughput is rated at a 2 Gbps baseline. Performance benchmarks highlight a top-tier Passmark memory score and strong single-core CPU capabilities, while multi-core execution and database operations remain average. This resource profile delivers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive tasks without requiring excessive compute scaling. The r3-64 is well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, text processing, and medium-scale database workloads.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-64 is a memory-optimized KVM server featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 200 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier memory performance for database and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-speed NVMe storage for demanding database and caching workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Local 200 GB NVMe SSD storage and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
